seoTitle: How to Embed Instagram Into a GoHighLevel Website
metaDescription: Learn how to embed your Instagram feed into a GoHighLevel website to boost visual engagement and showcase your social presence.
intro: Embedding your Instagram feed directly into your GoHighLevel website adds visual engagement and lets visitors see your latest content without leaving the page. This guide covers finding your embed code, inserting it correctly, and customizing how the feed displays. It's designed for beginners, digital marketers, entrepreneurs, and agency owners who want their site to feel more current and connected to their social presence.

steps.heading: Locate your Instagram embed code
steps.body: Find the embed code from your Instagram account or a supporting tool that generates the feed you want to display.

steps.heading: Insert Instagram into your GoHighLevel website
steps.body: Add the embed code to the appropriate section of your website builder so the Instagram feed displays where intended.

steps.heading: Follow best practices for displaying social media content
steps.body: Position the feed where it adds value, such as near a gallery or testimonials section, rather than as a distraction from your main content.

steps.heading: Customize your embedded feed
steps.body: Adjust display settings where available so the feed fits your site's overall design and layout.

steps.heading: Leverage Instagram for increased engagement
steps.body: A well-placed feed can showcase products or services visually, such as restaurants displaying dishes or fitness centers highlighting transformations.

faq.question: Do I need a business Instagram account to embed my feed?
faq.answer: Embedding typically relies on your account's public content, so it's worth checking your account settings to confirm what can be displayed.

faq.question: Will embedding Instagram slow down my GoHighLevel website?
faq.answer: Embedded feeds are generally pulled from an external source, which helps limit their impact on your site's own performance.

faq.question: Can I customize which posts appear in the embedded feed?
faq.answer: Display customization options can vary, so review the specific embedding tool you're using to see what control you have over the content shown.

faq.question: Is embedding Instagram useful for service-based businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, service businesses like fitness centers can use it to visually highlight results and build trust with website visitors.

faq.question: Is this feature accessible for beginners?
faq.answer: Yes, the process is designed to be easy to follow regardless of your technical background.
